prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PKSLUICEBOX-12X3-FBA Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12" Mini Gold Panning Pocket Aluminum Sluice Box, Ready to Run Description: The ASR Outdoor pocket aluminum mini sluice box is ideal for fine gold recovery. It comes out of the box, ready to run with pre-installed rubber sluice matting. Just spoon feed your classified material through the channel and provide a constant stream of water flow and watch the fine gold pickers and small gold flake appear on the V-Shape ribbed sluice matting. Made from rust resistant aluminum this 12 inch pocket sluice box will last for many years to come as this is a high-quality gold prospecting and mining equipment tool that wont let you down.

This pocket sluice box is small; at only 12" in length with a 3.5" wide channel it is one of the smallest prospecting tools that is easy to carry; incredibly lightweight and easy to assemble, with no tools required to set up. Woven vinyl miners moss can also be used in this mini sluice box and can be switched out simply by removing the wingnut and washer that holds everything in place. Use small glass collection vials for your recovered fine gold found through your gold panning efforts.

This ASR Outdoor mini sluice box could be used in the field while you survey new gold prospecting claims before packing in your large equipment; but it is much more practical for use at home or in the foreman trailer to evaluate your concentrate and make a decison on your claim. Likewise, this is a fun unit for beginner gold panners and classrooms to jump start their luck and understanding of gold prospecting with mail order pay dirt, without breaking the bank first.

Have a complete compact gold prospecting sluice box anywhere you are with this rugged piece of gold prospecting equipment by ASR Outdoor. Search Terms: pocket gold panning equipment prospecting mining sifting tool micro sluicebox classifier screen set adventure mineral collection hunter hobbyist Features: - NO ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Ready to run out of the box; Uses wing nut closures for easy set up; No tools required; Full gold mining equipment set ready to use, just add processed pay dirt concentrate - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: At only 12" length by 3.5" wide with 1.5" high channel walls, this aluminum pocket mini sluice box is easy to pack up in your hiking backpack for your next gold prospecting adventure - POCKET SLUICE BOX: Includes V-Shape ribbed rubber sluice box matting. Optional woven vinyl miners moss carpet can be installed under the rustproof angled mesh channel inserts if desired (not included) - WEATHERPROOF: Constructed from rust resistant aluminum this mini gold panning pocket sluice box is durable and built to last; ideal for fine gold recovery - BEGINNER GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Makes a great camping or outdoor activity for adults or kids; portable gold prospecting that wont break the bank and catches fine gold flakes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12" Mini Gold Panning Pocket Aluminum Sluice Box
